citizen-skin-desc: A beautiful, usable, responsive MediaWiki skin that makes extensions part of the cohesive experience. Initially created for the [https://starcitizen.tools/ Star Citizen Wiki].
citizen.css: /* All CSS here will be loaded for users of the Citizen skin */
citizen.js: /* All JavaScript here will be loaded for users of the Citizen skin */
citizen-preferences-load-error: Couldn't load preferences. Check your connection and try again.
citizen-notifications-error: Couldn't load notifications. Check your connection and try again.
citizen-share-qr-scan-hint: Scan to open on another device
citizen-theme-description: Switch between light and dark mode
citizen-feature-autohide-navigation-desc: Hide the navigation bar when scrolling down
citizen-feature-pure-black-description: Replace dark gray backgrounds with pure black
citizen-feature-custom-font-size-descrip: Change the font size of the body text
citizen-feature-custom-width-description: Change the width of the content area
citizen-user-info-text-anon: Your IP address will be publicly visible if you make any edits.
citizen-user-info-text-anon-temp: If you make an edit, a temporary account will be created for you.
citizen-user-info-text-temp: This temporary account was created after an edit was made without an account on this browser and device.
citizen-command-palette-load-error: The command palette couldn't be loaded. Please try again.
citizen-command-palette-command-file-des: Find images, PDFs, audio, video and other files
citizen-command-palette-command-history-: Browse this page's edit history and jump to a diff.
citizen-command-palette-command-ns-descr: Search for a page in a specific namespace
citizen-command-palette-command-smw-desc: Search using a Semantic MediaWiki query
citizen-command-palette-mode-action-desc: Find admin actions, special pages, and links pulled from the page menus.
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-de: An empty input shows the current page's categories. Select one to step into its subcategories and pages, then press <kbd>Backspace</kbd> on an empty input to back out a level.
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-em: Type to search every category on the wiki
citizen-command-palette-mode-category-no: Check the spelling or try a different search term
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-descri: Search the wiki's images, PDFs, audio, and video. Press <kbd>↵</kbd> to open the file's description page.
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-empty-: Start typing to search the wiki's media library.
citizen-command-palette-mode-file-noresu: Try a different keyword or check the spelling.
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-des: Browse the current page's recent revisions. Type to filter by editor or edit summary. Press <kbd>↵</kbd> to view a revision.
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-emp: Open a wiki page to see its history.
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-nor: Try a different editor name or edit summary keyword.
citizen-command-palette-mode-history-pla: Filter by editor or edit summary
citizen-command-palette-mode-namespace-d: In the default search, type a namespace prefix like Talk: and it turns into a chip that scopes the rest of your query.
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-empty-d: Type conditions like [[Category:City]] or [[Located in::Germany]] to query pages
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-malform: Close your condition with ]] to run the query
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-nocateg: Check the category name or try a broader search
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-noprint: Check the property name or try a broader search
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-noprope: Check the property name or try a broader search
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-noresul: Try broadening your conditions or check for typos
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-descrip: Chain Ask conditions like [[Category:City]] and [[Located in::Germany]] — each completed condition becomes a chip that narrows the query.
citizen-command-palette-mode-smw-novalue: Check the value or try a broader search
citizen-command-palette-mode-user-descri: Each user result has Talk and Contributions action buttons — press → to focus them.
citizen-command-palette-mode-user-empty-: Type a username to find user profiles
citizen-command-palette-mode-user-noresu: Check the spelling or try a different name
citizen-command-palette-queryaction-full: Search the full text of all pages
citizen-config-preview: Version-scoped switch for the Citizen preview channel. Set to the upcoming major release number (currently 4) to preview it before release; 0 or any other value keeps the stable experience.
citizen-config-usenewtoken: Opt-in switch for the new color token pipeline. Defaults to false; set to true to enable. The new pipeline becomes the default — and legacy is removed — in the next major Citizen release.
